summary: Collector Bingo locked state enhancements testing COMPLETE. All 8 testable features PASSED. The card is locked with user marks=[12] (only free space), so 'You missed last week' message correctly displays instead of locked card. Countdown strip shows properly styled with bee emoji, live countdown '13h 47m', and drop date 'Friday, Mar 6 at 9am'.
passed_tests: Locked state: countdown strip visible with data-testid='bingo-countdown' - PASS
Countdown shows live time in format '13h 47m' with data-testid='bingo-countdown-time' - PASS
Countdown strip shows next Friday drop date on the right side ('Friday, Mar 6 at 9am') - PASS
Countdown strip has cream background #FAF6EE (rgb(250, 246, 238)) - PASS
Countdown strip has amber border styling (1px solid rgba(200, 134, 26, 0.15)) - PASS
Countdown strip has 48px height and 12px border radius - PASS
Countdown strip has bee emoji on left, countdown center, drop date right - PASS
'You missed last week' message shows when user only has free space marks (marks=[12]) with data-testid='bingo-missed-msg' - PASS
Lock icon visible in header when card is locked - PASS
not_testable_due_to_state: Locked card at 60% opacity (data-testid='bingo-locked-card') - NOT TESTABLE: User didn't play (marks=[12]), so this element doesn't render
Clicking locked card opens modal - NOT TESTABLE: No locked card rendered for current user
Modal has full 5x5 grid, export button, community stats when locked - NOT TESTABLE: No modal accessible in current 'missed week' state

context_for_next_testing_agent: Collector Bingo locked state enhancements verified. Current state: card is locked (expired Feb 27 - Mar 2), demo user has marks=[12] (only free space = didn't play). Expected behaviors verified: 'You missed last week' message shows, NO locked card rendered, countdown strip has proper styling. To test locked card at 60% opacity and modal functionality, need a user who actually played (marks.length > 1). Key data-testid values: bingo-countdown, bingo-countdown-time, bingo-missed-msg, bingo-locked-card (only renders when user played). Auto-refresh on countdown zero implemented via interval that calls fetchBingo() when formatCountdown returns null.
